comparison_rule.description: This artifact checks executable reproduction plumbing and seed diagnostics. It does not compare against a numbered CPC figure or OpenFUSIONToolkit output.

x.convention: Major radius in axisymmetric cylindrical coordinates.
x.label: R

y.convention: Vertical coordinate in axisymmetric cylindrical coordinates.
y.label: Z

figure_recipe.citation: Hansen, C. et al. TokaMaker: An open-source time-dependent Grad-Shafranov tool for the design and modeling of axisymmetric fusion devices. Computer Physics Communications 298, 109111 (2024). doi:10.1016/j.cpc.2024.109111

literature_anchor.relationship: Seed-family surrogate for the literature reproduction workflow; pending OFT-backed fixture parity.
literature_anchor.source: Hansen et al., Computer Physics Communications 298, 109111 (2024)
literature_anchor.title: TokaMaker: An open-source time-dependent Grad-Shafranov tool for the design and modeling of axisymmetric fusion devices

representative_case.selection: middle pressure-scale member of the generated family

reproduction_scope.comparison_rule: Generated artifact and seed-solver diagnostics only; no OFT/TokaMaker numeric tolerance is asserted.

figure_recipe.name: tokamaker-cpc-seed-equilibrium-family
figure_recipe.source: Hansen et al., Computer Physics Communications 298, 109111 (2024)

limitations: Uses the current rectangular fixed-boundary seed solver, not TokaMaker's triangular FEM stack.
Does not model free-boundary coils, passive structures, reconstruction constraints, or time dependence.
Does not assert numeric parity with Hansen et al. CPC figures or OpenFUSIONToolkit examples.

source.citation: Hansen, C. et al. TokaMaker: An open-source time-dependent Grad-Shafranov tool for the design and modeling of axisymmetric fusion devices. Computer Physics Communications 298, 109111 (2024). doi:10.1016/j.cpc.2024.109111
